_comment: Gear data for Last Z heroes. Each hero has 4 slots: gun, helmet, armor, boots. Plus an exclusive piece. Tiers: purple < orange < exclusive < mythic. Enhancement levels: purple max 30, orange max 50 (75 with hexagons, 100 mythic). Stats at max enhancement (orange Lv50 base).

slots.name: Gun
slots.notes: Main damage source for heroes. Always prioritize upgrading first for DPS heroes.

slots.name: Helmet
slots.notes: Defensive piece. Good for frontline heroes and tanky builds.

slots.name: Armor
slots.notes: Core defensive piece. Damage resistance is the rarest and most valuable stat.

slots.name: Boots
slots.notes: Utility and survivability. Speed bonus affects march time.

slots.name: Exclusive
slots.notes: Hero-specific piece. Unlocks the hero's 3rd skill passive bonus. Craft after completing orange set.

tiers.name: Purple
tiers.notes: Do NOT enhance. Convert all purple gear to Enhancement Alloy immediately.

tiers.name: Orange
tiers.notes: The F2P endgame target. First promotion (Lv50→first hexagon) costs only 100 Power Cores — enormous stat gain, highest priority upgrade.

tiers.name: Exclusive
tiers.notes: Hero-specific. Craft after orange set is complete. Provides Skill 2 damage bonus and unlocks Skill 3 passive.

tiers.name: Mythic
tiers.notes: Endgame whale tier. Mythic transformation adds +25 to max enhancement cap.

generalTips: Never spend Enhancement Alloy or Power Cores on purple, blue, or green gear
First hexagon promotion (Orange Lv50) is the highest priority — 100 Power Cores + 1M Zent for massive stats
Complete the orange set before crafting the exclusive piece
Damage resistance (found on armor) is the rarest and most impactful stat in PvP

attack.notes: Direct damage multiplier. Best on Gun slot.

hp.notes: Survivability. Best on Helmet and Boots.

defense.notes: Reduces damage taken. Best on Armor.

damageResistance.notes: The rarest stat in the game. A separate damage multiplier that stacks with DEF. Only found on high-tier Armor pieces.

skillDamage.notes: Flat bonus to Skill 2 damage. Exclusive pieces add +450–600.
